hr_attendance_corrections_predecessor_ve.name: hr_attendance_corrections_predecessor_version_consistent
hr_attendance_corrections_predecessor_ve.value:
("hr_attendance_corrections"."correction_version" = 1
              AND "hr_attendance_corrections"."supersedes_attendance_correction_id" IS NULL)
          OR ("hr_attendance_corrections"."correction_version" > 1
              AND "hr_attendance_corrections"."supersedes_attendance_correction_id" IS NOT NULL)

hr_employment_record_versions_identifier.name: hr_employment_record_versions_identifier_values_valid
hr_employment_record_versions_identifier.value:
("hr_employment_record_versions"."employment_type_code" IS NULL OR char_length(trim("hr_employment_record_versions"."employment_type_code")) > 0)
          AND ("hr_employment_record_versions"."organization_reference" IS NULL OR char_length(trim("hr_employment_record_versions"."organization_reference")) > 0)
          AND ("hr_employment_record_versions"."position_reference" IS NULL OR char_length(trim("hr_employment_record_versions"."position_reference")) > 0)

hr_employment_record_versions_predecesso.name: hr_employment_record_versions_predecessor_version_consistent
hr_employment_record_versions_predecesso.value:
("hr_employment_record_versions"."version" = 1 AND "hr_employment_record_versions"."supersedes_version_id" IS NULL)
          OR ("hr_employment_record_versions"."version" > 1 AND "hr_employment_record_versions"."supersedes_version_id" IS NOT NULL)

hr_employment_record_versions_terminal_k.name: hr_employment_record_versions_terminal_kind_consistent
hr_employment_record_versions_terminal_k.value:
("hr_employment_record_versions"."version_kind" = 'effective' AND "hr_employment_record_versions"."terminal_version" = false)
          OR ("hr_employment_record_versions"."version_kind" = 'end' AND "hr_employment_record_versions"."terminal_version" = true
              AND "hr_employment_record_versions"."effective_to" IS NOT NULL)

hr_employment_records_status_head_consis.name: hr_employment_records_status_head_consistent
hr_employment_records_status_head_consis.value:
("hr_employment_records"."status" = 'draft' AND "hr_employment_records"."current_version_id" IS NULL)
          OR ("hr_employment_records"."status" IN ('active', 'ended') AND "hr_employment_records"."current_version_id" IS NOT NULL)

hr_leave_requests_decision_consistent.name: hr_leave_requests_decision_consistent
hr_leave_requests_decision_consistent.value: ("hr_leave_requests"."status" = 'submitted' AND "hr_leave_requests"."decided_at" IS NULL AND "hr_leave_requests"."decision_note" IS NULL) OR ("hr_leave_requests"."status" IN ('approved', 'rejected') AND "hr_leave_requests"."decided_at" IS NOT NULL)

hr_reporting_relationships_status_manage.name: hr_reporting_relationships_status_manager_consistent
hr_reporting_relationships_status_manage.value:
("hr_reporting_relationships"."relationship_status" = 'assigned' AND "hr_reporting_relationships"."manager_worker_profile_id" IS NOT NULL)
          OR ("hr_reporting_relationships"."relationship_status" = 'unassigned' AND "hr_reporting_relationships"."manager_worker_profile_id" IS NULL)

hr_shift_roster_versions_publication_con.name: hr_shift_roster_versions_publication_consistent
hr_shift_roster_versions_publication_con.value:
("hr_shift_roster_versions"."status" = 'draft' AND "hr_shift_roster_versions"."published_at" IS NULL
             AND "hr_shift_roster_versions"."supersedes_roster_version_id" IS NULL)
          OR ("hr_shift_roster_versions"."status" IN ('published', 'superseded') AND "hr_shift_roster_versions"."published_at" IS NOT NULL)

hr_workforce_status_history_transition_v.name: hr_workforce_status_history_transition_valid
hr_workforce_status_history_transition_v.value:
(("hr_workforce_status_history"."previous_status" IS NULL AND "hr_workforce_status_history"."new_status" = 'draft') OR
          ("hr_workforce_status_history"."previous_status" = 'draft' AND "hr_workforce_status_history"."new_status" = 'active') OR
          ("hr_workforce_status_history"."previous_status" = 'active' AND "hr_workforce_status_history"."new_status" IN ('suspended', 'terminated')) OR
          ("hr_workforce_status_history"."previous_status" = 'suspended' AND "hr_workforce_status_history"."new_status" IN ('active', 'terminated'))) IS TRUE

work_items_completion_consistent.name: work_items_completion_consistent
work_items_completion_consistent.value: ("work_items"."status" = 'completed' AND "work_items"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("work_items"."status" <> 'completed' AND "work_items"."completed_at" IS NULL)

workspace_tasks_completion_consistent.name: workspace_tasks_completion_consistent
workspace_tasks_completion_consistent.value: ("workspace_tasks"."status" = 'open' AND "workspace_tasks"."completed_at" IS NULL AND "workspace_tasks"."completion_note" IS NULL) OR ("workspace_tasks"."status" = 'completed' AND "workspace_tasks"."completed_at" IS NOT NULL)
